title: The Legend of Zelda: Majora's Mask
lede: Three days. One falling moon. Trapped in the cursed land of Termina, Link relives the same 72 hours over and over — wearing the souls of the fallen as masks — to free four Giants and stop the Skull Kid before the moon falls.

advisories.title: The Song of Time is your save — and your reset
advisories.body: Playing the Song of Time returns you to dawn on the First Day and saves. You keep masks, Heart Containers, Heart Pieces, weapons, and your sword/wallet/bomb-bag upgrades, but you lose all consumables (rupees, bombs, arrows, Deku Sticks) and most one-cycle event items. Bank your rupees and finish item-chains before you reset.

advisories.title: Slow time, don't rush it
advisories.body: Play the Inverted Song of Time (the Song of Time's notes reversed) the moment each cycle begins — it slows the clock to a third speed, turning 72 minutes of real dread into a manageable window. Use the Song of Double Time to skip straight to a dawn or dusk when an event needs a specific time.

advisories.title: Transformations are your toolkit
advisories.body: Deku flies from flower pads and skips on water; Goron rolls fast and survives lava; Zora swims and throws fin boomerangs. Most puzzles are really asking 'which form?' — pause and switch before forcing a room.

advisories.title: The Bombers' Notebook runs on a timetable
advisories.body: Side quests fire at specific days and clock times. The marquee chain — Anju & Kafei — spans all three days with timed handoffs. Use the schedule in the reference panel below and the Song of Double Time to be in the right place at the right hour.

timeCycle.cycleLength: 72 hours · three in-game days (about 54 real minutes at normal speed)
timeCycle.resetMechanic: Play the Song of Time to rewind to dawn on the First Day. This also saves your game.
lost: Bombs, Bombchu, arrows, Deku Sticks & Nuts
Most one-cycle event items (deeds, letters, eggs, bottled potions)
Dungeon Small Keys & temporary progress inside a not-yet-cleared temple

controls.name: Song of Time
controls.effect: Reset to the First Day and save.

controls.name: Inverted Song of Time
controls.effect: Slow time to one-third speed for the rest of the cycle.

controls.name: Song of Double Time
controls.effect: Skip forward to the next dawn or dusk.

controls.name: Song of Soaring
controls.effect: Warp to any Owl Statue you've activated — your fastest travel.

timeCycle.note: Defeating a temple boss is permanent across resets (the Giant stays freed), but the region's curse only lifts within a cycle you've cleared it in — so collect a region's time-sensitive pickups in the same loop you beat its temple.

songs.name: Song of Time
songs.where: Remembered once you recover the Ocarina of Time from the Skull Kid.
songs.use: Returns you to the dawn of the First Day — resets the three-day cycle and saves.

songs.name: Inverted Song of Time
songs.where: Play the Song of Time's notes in reverse.
songs.use: Slows time to a third speed, stretching each cycle.

songs.name: Song of Double Time
songs.where: Play each Song of Time note twice.
songs.use: Jumps time forward to the next dawn or dusk.

songs.name: Song of Healing
songs.where: Taught by the Happy Mask Salesman after you regain the Ocarina.
songs.use: Soothes troubled spirits and lifts curses, often leaving a wearable mask behind.

songs.name: Sonata of Awakening
songs.where: Taught by the imprisoned monkey in Deku Palace.
songs.use: Rouses sleeping things — raises Woodfall Temple and wakes certain characters.

songs.name: Goron Lullaby
songs.where: Completed from the Goron Elder's baby in Goron Village (after the Elder's intro).
songs.use: Sends listeners to sleep — quiets Goron babies and the boulder blocking the Powder Keg, and Biggoron.

songs.name: New Wave Bossa Nova
songs.where: Taught by the Zora egg larvae in the Marine Research Lab once all eggs are gathered.
songs.use: Summons the giant turtle to ferry you to the Great Bay Temple.

songs.name: Elegy of Emptiness
songs.where: Taught by the King of Ikana after you defeat him in the Ancient Castle.
songs.use: Leaves a hollow statue of your current form to hold down switches in Stone Tower.

songs.name: Oath to Order
songs.where: Learned by freeing the giant after each temple boss.
songs.use: Calls the four Giants; played atop the Clock Tower to catch the falling Moon.

songs.name: Song of Soaring
songs.where: From a stone tablet near the Southern Swamp.
songs.use: Warps instantly to any Owl Statue you've activated.

songs.name: Epona's Song
songs.where: Recalled with Romani at Romani Ranch.
songs.use: Calls Epona to your side and calms certain cows.

songs.name: Song of Storms
songs.where: Taught by the ghost Flat beneath a grave in the Ikana Graveyard.
songs.use: Summons rain — fills dry wells and springs and reveals hidden grottoes.

scheduledEvents.name: Anju — Stock Pot Inn
scheduledEvents.location: East Clock Town · Stock Pot Inn
scheduledEvents.prereq: Claim a reservation, or wear Kafei's Mask after the postman delivers Kafei's letter
scheduledEvents.reward: Begins the Couple's Mask chain; Room Key
scheduledEvents.detail: Anju runs the inn and anchors the game's longest sidequest, spanning all three days.

scheduledEvents.name: Kafei's Mask — Madame Aroma
scheduledEvents.prereq: Agree to search for Madame Aroma's missing son
scheduledEvents.detail: Madame Aroma lends the mask of her son Kafei to aid the search.

scheduledEvents.name: Letter to Kafei — Anju at midnight
scheduledEvents.location: East Clock Town · Stock Pot Inn kitchen
scheduledEvents.prereq: Show Anju Kafei's Mask; the postman delivers Kafei's letter ~1:40pm Day 1
scheduledEvents.detail: Anju entrusts you with a letter for her missing fiancé.

scheduledEvents.name: Mail the Letter to Kafei
scheduledEvents.prereq: Hold the Letter to Kafei
scheduledEvents.detail: The postman collects the letter on his morning round and delivers it to Kafei.

scheduledEvents.name: Kafei — Curiosity Shop back room
scheduledEvents.location: West Clock Town · Laundry Pool → Curiosity Shop hideout
scheduledEvents.prereq: Mailed the letter; follow the masked child
scheduledEvents.detail: Kafei, shrunk to a child by the Skull Kid, explains his stolen wedding mask and gives the pendant.

scheduledEvents.name: Give Pendant to Anju
scheduledEvents.location: East Clock Town · Stock Pot Inn
scheduledEvents.prereq: Hold the Pendant of Memories
scheduledEvents.reward: Anju will wait rather than flee
scheduledEvents.detail: Kafei's pendant convinces Anju to stay in town despite the moon.

scheduledEvents.name: Special Delivery to Mama
scheduledEvents.location: West Clock Town · Curiosity Shop back room
scheduledEvents.prereq: Anju & Kafei chain reached the Final Day
scheduledEvents.detail: The Curiosity Shop owner asks you to carry a letter to Kafei's mother.

scheduledEvents.name: Sakon's Hideout — recover the Sun's Mask
scheduledEvents.prereq: On the Anju & Kafei chain with Kafei
scheduledEvents.detail: You and Kafei solve a switch-and-conveyor puzzle to grab the wedding mask before it is lost.

scheduledEvents.name: Couple's Mask — the reunion
scheduledEvents.location: East Clock Town · Stock Pot Inn
scheduledEvents.prereq: Completed the full chain including Sakon's Hideout
scheduledEvents.detail: The reunited couple merge the Sun's and Moon's Masks into the Couple's Mask and give it to you.

scheduledEvents.name: Old Lady from the Bomb Shop
scheduledEvents.prereq: Strike the thief Sakon to make him drop the bombs (skip this if running the Anju & Kafei quest)
scheduledEvents.detail: Stopping Sakon from robbing the bomb-shop lady earns the Blast Mask.

scheduledEvents.name: Guru-Guru — Bremen Mask
scheduledEvents.prereq: Approach as Hylian Link and hear the musician's confession
scheduledEvents.detail: The music-box man gives you his Bremen Mask after his late-night confession.

scheduledEvents.name: Grog's chicks (Bremen march)
scheduledEvents.prereq: Wear the Bremen Mask and march so every chick follows and grows up
scheduledEvents.detail: Raising Grog's chicks to adulthood earns the speed-boosting Bunny Hood.

scheduledEvents.name: Romani — alien defence
scheduledEvents.prereq: Agree to help Romani during the day; bring a bow
scheduledEvents.reward: Bottle of milk; opens the Romani's Mask chain
scheduledEvents.detail: Shoot the invading 'ghosts' before they reach the barn and take the cows.

scheduledEvents.name: Cremia — milk run
scheduledEvents.location: Milk Road, Romani Ranch → Clock Town
scheduledEvents.prereq: Defend the ranch on Night 1 first
scheduledEvents.detail: Guard Cremia's wagon, shooting the masked riders who attack on the road.

scheduledEvents.name: Gorman Brothers — horse race
scheduledEvents.prereq: Ride Epona and beat both brothers
scheduledEvents.detail: Winning the racetrack on Epona earns Garo's Mask, needed to enter the Milk Bar.

scheduledEvents.name: Postman — Postman's Hat
scheduledEvents.prereq: Deliver the Special Delivery to Mama so the Postman is freed from his schedule
scheduledEvents.detail: Relieved of duty, the terrified Postman gives you his hat before fleeing the moon.

scheduledEvents.name: Swordsman — Expert Course
scheduledEvents.prereq: Cut all logs with jump attacks for a perfect 30
scheduledEvents.detail: Acing the log-cutting course rewards a Heart Piece.

scheduledEvents.name: Kamaro — Kamaro's Mask
scheduledEvents.location: Termina Field · mushroom rock north of town
scheduledEvents.prereq: Play the Song of Healing for the dancing ghost
scheduledEvents.detail: Healing the spirit of the dancer Kamaro yields his mask and dance.

scheduledEvents.name: Rosa Sisters — the dance
scheduledEvents.prereq: Wear Kamaro's Mask and perform the dance
scheduledEvents.detail: Teaching the Rosa Sisters their routine earns a Heart Piece.

scheduledEvents.name: Shiro — Stone Mask
scheduledEvents.prereq: Find the invisible Shiro with the Lens of Truth and give him a potion
scheduledEvents.detail: Reviving the overlooked soldier grants the Stone Mask, which makes enemies ignore you.

scheduledEvents.name: Gorman Troupe — Circus Leader's Mask
scheduledEvents.prereq: Have Romani's Mask to enter; pass Toto's sound-check in all four forms
scheduledEvents.detail: After the band's rehearsal succeeds, troupe leader Gorman gives you his mask.

itemReference.name: Deku Mask
itemReference.where: Happy Mask Salesman, after the Song of Healing
itemReference.unlocks: Hop on water, launch from flower pads, fire bubbles.

itemReference.name: Goron Mask
itemReference.where: Song of Healing for Darmani's spirit, Goron Graveyard
itemReference.unlocks: Roll at speed, punch, ground-pound, survive lava.

itemReference.name: Zora Mask
itemReference.where: Song of Healing for the dying Mikau, Great Bay Coast
itemReference.unlocks: Swim fast, dive, throw fin boomerangs, raise an electric shield.

itemReference.name: Fierce Deity's Mask
itemReference.where: Trade all 20 ordinary masks to the Moon Children
itemReference.unlocks: Become the towering Fierce Deity and fire sword beams — usable on bosses.

itemReference.name: Hero's Bow
itemReference.unlocks: Shoot eye-switches and distant enemies; base for the three elemental arrows.

itemReference.name: Fire Arrows
itemReference.unlocks: Melt ice and light frozen torches.

itemReference.name: Ice Arrows
itemReference.unlocks: Freeze water and enemies into solid platforms.

itemReference.name: Light Arrows
itemReference.unlocks: Flip Stone Tower, pierce Gomess's cloak, and stagger Majora.

itemReference.name: Hookshot
itemReference.unlocks: Grapple to targets and pull across gaps — opens far Heart Pieces.

itemReference.name: Lens of Truth
itemReference.where: Hidden grotto near the Southern Swamp
itemReference.unlocks: Reveals invisible platforms, walls, and Shiro (drains magic).

itemReference.name: Powder Keg
itemReference.where: Pass the Goron's big-bomb test (Mountain Village)
itemReference.unlocks: Giant bombs that blow open the boulder to the Bomb Shop and Romani Ranch gate.

itemReference.name: Pictograph Box
itemReference.unlocks: Photograph people and places for several side quests and Heart Pieces.

itemReference.name: Great Fairy's Sword
itemReference.where: Reunite the Great Fairy's stray fairies (Ikana)
itemReference.unlocks: The strongest two-handed blade — far above the forged Gilded Sword.

itemReference.name: Gilded Sword
itemReference.where: Give the Razor Sword + a Gold Dust to the Mountain Smithy
itemReference.unlocks: A permanent, unbreakable sword upgrade that survives resets.

collectibleCategories.name: Pieces of Heart
collectibleCategories.note: Four pieces make one Heart Container (bosses give a full container too). Many are gated behind a specific transformation, song, or mask, and several are tied to timed Bombers'-Notebook events — so plan which cycle you collect them in.

entries.label: Post Office timing game
entries.requires: Stop the Postman's counter at exactly 10 seconds (Bunny Hood helps)

entries.label: Clock Tower ledge
entries.requires: Give the Business Scrub the Moon's Tear, then launch from its Deku Flower

entries.label: Bank reward
entries.requires: Deposit a running total of 5000 Rupees

entries.label: Stock Pot Inn toilet hand
entries.requires: Reach the inn at night and give the hand a piece of paper

entries.label: Deku platform jump
entries.location: North Clock Town, near the slide
entries.requires: As Deku Link, hop to the nearby tree

entries.label: Swordsman's School
entries.requires: Score a perfect 30 in the Expert Course

entries.label: Deku Scrub Playground
entries.requires: As Deku Link, win the float game all three days

entries.label: Honey & Darling's game
entries.location: West Clock Town Honey & Darling shop
entries.requires: Win the minigame on three consecutive days

entries.label: Town Shooting Gallery
entries.requires: Score a perfect 50 with the Hero's Bow

entries.label: Treasure-hunting game
entries.location: East Clock Town Treasure Chest Shop
entries.requires: Win the game as Goron Link

entries.label: Rosa Sisters' dance
entries.requires: Wear Kamaro's Mask and dance for the Rosa Sisters

entries.label: Grandma's long story
entries.requires: Wear the All-Night Mask through her Carnival tale

entries.label: Grandma's second story
entries.requires: Wear the All-Night Mask through her hide-and-seek tale

entries.label: Postman's postbox
entries.requires: Wear the Postman's Hat and check a postbox

entries.label: Couple's Mask reward
entries.requires: Complete the Anju & Kafei quest, then wear the Couple's Mask in the office

entries.label: Keaton's quiz
entries.requires: As Deku Link sink into the grass, wear the Keaton Mask, answer all five questions

entries.label: Peahat hole
entries.requires: As Deku Link, drop in and defeat the Peahat

entries.label: Dodongo hole
entries.requires: Defeat the two Dodongos inside

entries.label: Business Scrub cave
entries.location: Cave near the Astral Observatory path
entries.requires: As Deku Link, haggle the Business Scrub down and pay 100 Rupees

entries.label: Gossip Stone match
entries.location: Four holes with Gossip Stones, Termina Field
entries.requires: Play a learned area song until all four stones glow the same colour

entries.label: Beehive over water
entries.location: West Termina Field near Great Bay
entries.requires: Blast the boulder, destroy the beehives, then dive as Zora to grab it

entries.label: Doggy Racetrack
entries.requires: Pick a winning dog (Mask of Truth helps) and earn 150 Rupees

entries.label: Southern Swamp vine tree
entries.requires: As Deku Link, climb the vines by the tree

entries.label: Tourist Center roof
entries.location: Roof of the Swamp Tourist Center
entries.requires: Advance the Title Deed chain, then float from a flower onto the roof

entries.label: Swamp Shooting Gallery
entries.requires: Score 2000+ with the Hero's Bow

entries.label: Pictograph contest
entries.requires: Photograph the Deku King and show Koume

entries.label: Boat-cruise targets
entries.requires: After Woodfall, shoot the targets 20 times while sparing Koume

entries.label: Deku Palace garden
entries.requires: As Deku Link reach the far end of the western monkey garden

entries.label: Woodfall flower chain
entries.requires: As Deku Link, float flower-to-flower around the rim and open the chest

entries.label: Mountain Village ledge
entries.requires: Advance the Title Deed chain, then float from a Deku Flower to the ledge

entries.label: Don Gero's frog choir
entries.requires: As Goron, get Don Gero's Mask and gather all five frogs after spring returns

entries.label: Mountain river bottom
entries.requires: After defeating Goht, dive to the riverbed as Zora

entries.label: Scarecrow platform
entries.requires: Use the Scarecrow's Song and Hookshot to reach the high scarecrow

entries.label: Giant fish aquarium
entries.requires: Bring four bottled fish to feed the tank until the big fish spits it out

entries.label: Zora Cape waterfall
entries.requires: As Zora, defeat the Like Like at the waterfall base

entries.label: Zora Hall piano duet
entries.requires: As Zora, learn the bassist's part and play with the band

entries.label: Lulu's room ledge
entries.requires: Complete the Title Deed chain, then float up as Deku Link

entries.label: Pirates' Fortress cell
entries.requires: As Goron hit the switch and roll into the closing cell

entries.label: Pinnacle Rock seahorse
entries.requires: Photograph a pirate for the Seahorse, then as Zora beat the Deep Pythons

entries.label: Magic bean platform
entries.requires: Plant and water a Magic Bean, ride it up, then Hookshot across

entries.label: Beaver Brothers race
entries.requires: As Zora, beat both beavers' time on the second race

entries.label: Fisherman's jumping game
entries.requires: After defeating Gyorg, Hookshot ring-to-ring and score 20+

entries.label: Oceanside Skulltula reward
entries.requires: Shoot the masks in the order the Stalchildren's clues give

entries.label: Sakon's Hideout flower
entries.requires: Complete the final Title Deed chain, then float up as Deku Link

entries.label: Graveyard Iron Knuckle
entries.requires: Use the Captain's Hat and Lens of Truth, then defeat the Iron Knuckle

entries.label: Beneath the Graveyard
entries.requires: Use the Captain's Hat to command Stalchildren to dig

entries.label: Spirit House (Poe Sisters)
entries.requires: Defeat the Poe Sisters with Ice Arrows without dropping below three hearts

entries.label: Ikana Castle roof
entries.requires: Shoot the crystal switch and float via Deku Flowers to the chest

entries.label: Secret Shrine
entries.requires: Clear the four hidden mini-boss rooms for the chest

entries.label: Moon Deku trial
entries.requires: Trade masks to the Deku-mask child and clear his platforming trial

entries.label: Moon Goron trial
entries.requires: Trade masks to the Goron-mask child and clear his rolling trial

entries.label: Moon Zora trial
entries.requires: Trade masks to the Zora-mask child and clear his trial

collectibleCategories.name: Masks
collectibleCategories.note: Twenty-four masks in all: four transformations (Deku, Goron, Zora, Fierce Deity) and twenty ordinary masks, most won from the souls and schedules of Termina's people. The twenty ordinary masks are the price of the Fierce Deity's Mask on the Moon.

entries.label: Deku Mask
entries.location: From the Happy Mask Salesman after you recover the Ocarina and learn the Song of Healing.
entries.requires: Become Deku Link — skip across water, launch from flower pads, fire bubbles.

entries.label: Goron Mask
entries.location: Play the Song of Healing for Darmani's spirit at his grave in the Goron Graveyard.
entries.requires: Become Goron Link — roll at speed, punch, ground-pound, and shrug off lava.

entries.label: Zora Mask
entries.location: Play the Song of Healing for the dying Zora Mikau on Great Bay Coast.
entries.requires: Become Zora Link — swim fast, dive, throw fin boomerangs, raise an electric shield.

entries.label: Postman's Hat
entries.location: During the Anju & Kafei quest, hand the Postman the Special Delivery to Mama.
entries.requires: Loot Clock Town's postboxes (and a Heart Piece).

entries.label: All-Night Mask
entries.location: Buy from the Curiosity Shop late in the Anju & Kafei chain.
entries.requires: Stay awake through the Old Lady's long bedtime stories.

entries.label: Blast Mask
entries.location: Stop Sakon robbing the Old Lady in North Clock Town on the first night.
entries.requires: Detonate a bomb blast on command without spending bombs (hurts you up close).

entries.label: Stone Mask
entries.location: Use the Lens of Truth to find the invisible soldier Shiro on the road to Ikana and give him a potion.
entries.requires: Turn invisible to most enemies, who simply ignore you.

entries.label: Great Fairy's Mask
entries.location: Return the first Stray Fairy to the Great Fairy in North Clock Town.
entries.requires: Draws nearby Stray Fairies toward you — eases collecting them in temples.

entries.label: Keaton Mask
entries.location: Given during the Curiosity Shop / Kafei chain.
entries.requires: Summons Keaton's rupee quiz from certain bushes; advances the Anju & Kafei quest.

entries.label: Bremen Mask
entries.location: Talk to Guru-Guru at the Laundry Pool at night.
entries.requires: March a line of baby Cuccos to raise them into adults.

entries.label: Bunny Hood
entries.location: Raise all the chicks at the Cucco Shack with the Bremen Mask; Grog gives the hood.
entries.requires: Greatly increases your running speed.

entries.label: Don Gero's Mask
entries.location: As Goron Link, give Rock Sirloin to the hungry Goron in the Mountain Village.
entries.requires: Reunites the frog choir; gathering all five frogs earns a Heart Piece.

entries.label: Mask of Scents
entries.location: After rescuing the Deku Princess, win the Deku Butler's underground race.
entries.requires: Sniff out hidden items and magic mushrooms.

entries.label: Romani's Mask
entries.location: Defend Romani Ranch from the aliens (Day 1 night), then escort Cremia's milk wagon (Day 2 night).
entries.requires: Proves Milk Bar membership — opens the Latte Milk Bar.

entries.label: Circus Leader's Mask
entries.location: Wearing Romani's Mask, play the Ballad of the Wind Fish for Toto in the Milk Bar in all four forms.
entries.requires: Calms Gorman; used in the Gorman troupe storyline.

entries.label: Kamaro's Mask
entries.location: Play the Song of Healing for the ghost dancer Kamaro in northern Termina Field at night.
entries.requires: Perform Kamaro's dance — shown to the Rosa Sisters for a Heart Piece.

entries.label: Gibdo Mask
entries.location: Cure the cursed father in the Music Box House at the foot of Ikana with the Song of Healing.
entries.requires: Gibdos and ReDeads beg for food instead of attacking, and will talk.

entries.label: Garo's Mask
entries.location: As Goron Link, beat the Gorman Brothers in the Gorman Track horse race.
entries.requires: Summons Garo Masters for hints; needed to progress through Ikana Canyon.

entries.label: Captain's Hat
entries.location: Best Captain Keeta, the giant skeleton in the Ikana Graveyard.
entries.requires: Commands Stalchildren, who obey you and open the way.

entries.label: Giant's Mask
entries.location: In a chest revealed partway through the Twinmold boss arena, Stone Tower Temple.
entries.requires: Grows Link giant-sized to fight Twinmold (drains magic while worn).

entries.label: Mask of Truth
entries.location: Defeat every Gold Skulltula in the Swamp Spider House.
entries.requires: Read Gossip Stones and talk to animals for hints.

entries.label: Kafei's Mask
entries.location: From Madame Aroma at the Mayor's Residence when asked to find the missing Kafei.
entries.requires: Shown around town to gather clues — starts the Anju & Kafei quest.

entries.label: Couple's Mask
entries.location: Complete the Anju & Kafei quest and reunite them (the Pendant of Memories chain).
entries.requires: Shown to the Mayor to settle the evacuation argument for a Heart Piece.

entries.label: Fierce Deity's Mask
entries.location: Inside the Moon, give all 20 ordinary masks to the Moon Children to clear their trials.
entries.requires: Become the towering Fierce Deity, firing sword beams — usable against the bosses.

collectibleCategories.name: Gold Skulltula Houses
collectibleCategories.note: Two cursed Spider Houses, 30 Gold Skulltula tokens each. Clear a house in a single visit to lift its curse for the reward.

entries.label: Swamp Spider House (30 tokens)
entries.location: Mask of Truth (lifts the cursed man's curse)
entries.requires: Use the Deku Mask to float to high webs; Bombs and the Hero's Bow reach the hidden tokens

entries.label: Oceanside Spider House (30 tokens)
entries.location: Giant's Wallet (5000-Rupee capacity) if cleared before the man closes up; otherwise a Gold Rupee
entries.requires: Needs the Hero's Bow and explosives; some tokens need the Hookshot and light puzzles

sideQuestChains.name: The Anju & Kafei reunion
sideQuestChains.reward: Couple's Mask — and the game's most moving sidequest

steps.label: Anju — Stock Pot Inn
steps.detail: Anju runs the inn and anchors the game's longest sidequest, spanning all three days.
steps.requires: All · Day 1 from ~1:40pm · East Clock Town · Stock Pot Inn

steps.label: Kafei's Mask — Madame Aroma
steps.detail: Madame Aroma lends the mask of her son Kafei to aid the search.
steps.requires: Day 1 · ~10:00am–6:00pm · East Clock Town · Mayor's Residence

steps.label: Letter to Kafei — Anju at midnight
steps.detail: Anju entrusts you with a letter for her missing fiancé.
steps.requires: Night 1 · 12:00am–6:00am · East Clock Town · Stock Pot Inn kitchen

steps.label: Mail the Letter to Kafei
steps.detail: The postman collects the letter on his morning round and delivers it to Kafei.
steps.requires: Day 2 · Before the ~9:00am pickup · Any Clock Town postbox

steps.label: Kafei — Curiosity Shop back room
steps.detail: Kafei, shrunk to a child by the Skull Kid, explains his stolen wedding mask and gives the pendant.
steps.requires: Day 2 · ~3:00pm–6:00pm · West Clock Town · Laundry Pool → Curiosity Shop hideout

steps.label: Give Pendant to Anju
steps.detail: Kafei's pendant convinces Anju to stay in town despite the moon.
steps.requires: Day 2 or 3 · ~10:00am–7:00pm · East Clock Town · Stock Pot Inn

steps.label: Special Delivery to Mama
steps.detail: The Curiosity Shop owner asks you to carry a letter to Kafei's mother.
steps.requires: Final Day · ~1:00pm–6:00pm · West Clock Town · Curiosity Shop back room

steps.label: Sakon's Hideout — recover the Sun's Mask
steps.detail: You and Kafei solve a switch-and-conveyor puzzle to grab the wedding mask before it is lost.
steps.requires: Final Day · From ~6:00pm · Ikana Canyon · Sakon's Hideout

steps.label: Couple's Mask — the reunion
steps.detail: The reunited couple merge the Sun's and Moon's Masks into the Couple's Mask and give it to you.
steps.requires: Final Night · ~from 6:00pm (late-countdown reunion) · East Clock Town · Stock Pot Inn

bossFights.name: Odolwa

prep.healthAdvice: Bring a full quiver and a few bottled fairies; Deku Nuts can stun the small adds.
prep.topUpBefore: Refill hearts and magic at a Fairy Fountain or with bottled fairies before the boss door.

phases.name: Odolwa
phases.summary: Odolwa guards behind his shield, so wait for him to drop his stance — while chanting, dancing, or winding up a swing — and fire an arrow to stun him, then rush in and slash. Shooting him mid-chant also cancels the moths and beetles he summons. Keep moving to dodge his jumping sword strikes.

ifYouStruggle.whereToHeal: Exit to the Woodfall Owl Statue and refill with the swamp's fairy fountain.
ifYouStruggle.easierTactic: Fire an arrow the instant he drops his guard to chant or dance — it both stuns him and cancels the bugs he summons.

bossFights.reward: First Giant freed; a Heart Container and a step toward the Oath to Order.

bossFights.name: Goht

prep.healthAdvice: Keep arrows and magic topped up — the Goron-roll spikes need magic, and you open with a Fire Arrow.
prep.topUpBefore: Refill hearts and magic at a Fairy Fountain or with bottled fairies before the boss door.

phases.name: Goht
phases.summary: Melt the frozen Goht with a Fire Arrow to start the fight, then put on the Goron Mask and roll after it around the circular arena, grabbing magic jars to keep your spikes out. Ram it or strike it mid-leap to knock it down, then pile on roll attacks. Dodge the falling stalactites and the rocks it hurls back.

ifYouStruggle.whereToHeal: Warp out to the Mountain Village fountain to refill magic and hearts.
ifYouStruggle.easierTactic: Grab the magic jars around the arena so your Goron spikes never run dry — a spiked roll knocks Goht down every time.

bossFights.reward: Second Giant freed; the eternal winter lifts and spring returns to the mountains.

bossFights.name: Gyorg

prep.healthAdvice: Bring a full quiver — you stun Gyorg from the platform with arrows before diving as Zora.
prep.topUpBefore: Refill hearts and magic at a Fairy Fountain or with bottled fairies before the boss door.

phases.name: Gyorg
phases.summary: From the central platform, Z-target Gyorg as it surfaces and shoot it to stun it; it floats limp underwater for a moment. Quickly don the Zora Mask, dive, and hit it with the electric barrier or fin slashes for heavy damage before it recovers. Avoid being swallowed and shake off the small fish it spawns, refilling arrows from the platform jars between rounds.

ifYouStruggle.whereToHeal: Warp to the Great Bay Owl Statue and use the coast's fairy fountain.
ifYouStruggle.easierTactic: Never swim in open water while Gyorg is active — stun it from the platform first, then dive only to land the electric barrier.

bossFights.reward: Third Giant freed; the poisoned bay clears.

bossFights.name: Twinmold

prep.healthAdvice: Stock magic to the brim — the Giant's Mask drains it constantly. Grab jars between grapples.
prep.topUpBefore: Refill hearts and magic at a Fairy Fountain or with bottled fairies before the boss door.

phases.name: Twinmold
phases.summary: Twinmold is a pair of colossal sand serpents, one red and one blue. Put on the Giant's Mask to grow to their scale, then grapple and punch their bodies or seize a passing tail and slam it. Manage the mask's magic drain by grabbing magic jars, and focus one worm down at a time until both are destroyed.

ifYouStruggle.whereToHeal: Warp to the Stone Tower / Ikana Owl Statue to refill before re-entering.
ifYouStruggle.easierTactic: Focus one serpent at a time: grab its tail and slam it, ignoring the other until the first is gone.

bossFights.reward: Final Giant freed — all four can now be called with the Oath to Order.

bossFights.name: Majora's Mask

prep.healthAdvice: If you have the Fierce Deity's Mask, bring full magic. Otherwise bring full arrows, bottled fairies, and the Zora and Goron masks.
prep.topUpBefore: Refill hearts and magic at a Fairy Fountain or with bottled fairies before the boss door.

phases.name: Majora's Mask
phases.summary: Three forms in a row. Majora's Mask hovers and lashes cord-like tentacles — shoot or strike it. Majora's Incarnation sprouts limbs and sprints around the room — chase it with arrows or sword beams. Majora's Wrath flails whip-like tentacle arms — stun it with arrows, dodge the whips, and pound it down. The Fierce Deity's Mask trivialises every phase, ending each in seconds with sword beams.

ifYouStruggle.whereToHeal: There is no healing mid-fight beyond bottled fairies — stock three before entering.
ifYouStruggle.easierTactic: Trade all 20 ordinary masks to the Moon Children for the Fierce Deity's Mask; its sword beams shred every one of Majora's three forms in seconds.

bossFights.reward: Majora is undone, the Giants halt the moon, and Termina is saved.

sections.title: Clock Town & the Three-Day Cycle
sections.subtitle: Lose your form → recover the Ocarina → learn the Song of Time → become Hylian Link

video.creator: LongplayArchive
video.title: The Legend of Zelda: Majora's Mask — Full Longplay (N64)

steps.text: Chase the Skull Kid down the forest chasm. He curses you into a Deku Scrub and steals the Ocarina, then flees into Clock Town. You arrive with the moon three days from falling.
Find the Happy Mask Salesman in the Clock Tower. He'll lift the curse — but only if you bring back the Ocarina before the cycle ends. He teaches you the Song of Healing on the spot.

Explore Clock Town's four quarters. Buy a Deku Flower route to the high ledges, join the Bombers' Secret Society (play hide-and-seek with the kids) to earn the Bombers' Notebook, and learn the town's rhythms.
Survive to midnight on the Final Day. The Clock Tower platform opens — climb it and confront the Skull Kid. Knock the Ocarina of Time from his hands.
Play the Song of Time (it returns in a flash of memory) to rewind to the First Day. Everything resets — but you keep the Ocarina.

Return to the Happy Mask Salesman and play the Song of Healing. The curse seals into the Deku Mask, restoring Hylian Link. You can now transform at will — and the real quest, the four temples, begins.

objectives.label: Chase the Skull Kid through the underground passage and lose your form to the curse
Reach Clock Town and meet the Happy Mask Salesman
Climb the Clock Tower at midnight on the Final Day and take back the Ocarina
Learn the Song of Time to reset the three-day cycle
Play the Song of Healing for the Salesman to lift the curse and gain the Deku Mask

rooms.name: Underground Passage
rooms.solution: Follow the Skull Kid down the spiralling tunnel, crossing collapsing flower-lined platforms to the door where the curse takes hold.

rooms.name: Clock Tower Interior
rooms.solution: Meet the Happy Mask Salesman; he teaches the Song of Healing and gives you three days to recover the Ocarina.

rooms.name: Clock Town (the cycle)
rooms.solution: Explore the four quarters of Clock Town. The Clock Tower platform only opens at midnight on the Final Day, during the carnival countdown.

rooms.name: Clock Tower Rooftop
rooms.solution: At midnight on the Final Day, confront the Skull Kid. Hit him to knock the Ocarina free, then play the Song of Time to rewind to the First Day.

rooms.name: Back to the Salesman
rooms.solution: In human form again, replay the Song of Healing to seal the curse into the Deku Mask — now you can transform at will.

markers.label: South — Clock Tower (opens midnight, Final Day)
West — Trading Post, Bomb Shop, Curiosity Shop, Bank
North — Great Fairy Fountain, playground, Sakon event
East — Stock Pot Inn, Milk Bar, Mayor's Residence

sections.title: Woodfall — the Southern Swamp
sections.subtitle: Cure the swamp → Sonata of Awakening → Hero's Bow → Odolwa

video.creator: LongplayArchive
video.title: The Legend of Zelda: Majora's Mask — Full Longplay (N64)

steps.text: Head south to the Southern Swamp. The water is poisoned and the Deku King has jailed an innocent monkey. Take the boat cruise or Deku-hop upriver to Deku Palace.
Sneak through the palace garden as Deku Link and reach the imprisoned monkey, who teaches you the Sonata of Awakening.
Cross the swamp to the temple platform. Play the Sonata of Awakening before the great statue to raise Woodfall Temple from the marsh.
Inside, win the Hero's Bow and use Deku-flower flight and eye-switches to reach the Boss Key. See the dungeon map and room solutions below.
Defeat Odolwa to free the first Giant. The swamp's poison clears — collect the region's time-sensitive Heart Pieces this cycle.
With the Giant freed, the Skull Kid's hold on Woodfall breaks. Warp back to Clock Town and turn toward the frozen mountains.

objectives.label: Raise the temple from the swamp by playing the Sonata of Awakening before it
Cleanse the poisoned water at its source
Claim the Hero's Bow
Collect the Boss Key and reach Odolwa
Defeat Odolwa to free the first Giant

rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.solution: Launch from the Deku Flowers to clear the poison pools and reach the side doors; light the torches to open the way.

rooms.name: Deku Flight Room
rooms.solution: Spin into a Deku Flower, take off, and glide between platforms, popping distant eye-switches and enemies with bubble shots.

rooms.name: Bow Chamber
rooms.solution: Cross the spinning blades and open the big chest for the Hero's Bow, then shoot the eye-switches to advance.

rooms.name: Torch Maze
rooms.solution: Carry flame on a Deku Stick or fire arrows to light each torch in sequence, raising platforms and unbarring doors.

rooms.name: Gekko Mini-Boss
rooms.solution: Stun the Snapper that Gekko rides, then slash Gekko when he leaps off.

rooms.name: Boss Key Vault
rooms.solution: Shoot the eye-switch above the door to drop the bars, then take the Boss Key.

sections.title: Snowhead — the Mountain Village
sections.subtitle: Goron Mask → thaw the mountain → Fire Arrows → Goht

video.creator: LongplayArchive
video.title: The Legend of Zelda: Majora's Mask — Full Longplay (N64)

steps.text: Travel north into an unnatural winter. In the Goron Graveyard, play the Song of Healing for the hero Darmani's spirit to receive the Goron Mask.
As Goron Link, soothe the crying Goron baby with the Goron Lullaby (learn it from the Elder's son), and pass the Goron's big-bomb test for the Powder Keg.
Goron-roll up the ramp to Snowhead Temple at the mountain's peak, battling through the blizzard.
Inside, clear the ice from the central pillar, win the Fire Arrows, and raise the giant column to link the floors. See the room solutions below.
Defeat Goht to free the second Giant. Spring returns to the mountains — new paths, frogs, and Heart Pieces open up.
With the thaw, the river to Great Bay flows again. Head for the coast.

objectives.label: Clear the ice columns choking the central pillar
Win the Fire Arrows to melt ice and light frozen torches
Raise the giant pillar to link the upper floors
Collect the Boss Key and climb to the top
Defeat Goht to free the second Giant and end the winter

rooms.name: Central Pillar Hub
rooms.solution: Goron-punch the ice cylinders off the core pillar so you can later Goron-roll up its ramp to the higher floors.

rooms.name: Frozen Bridge
rooms.solution: Boost off a ramp with a Goron-roll to leap the gaps, or freeze the flow into ice platforms to cross.

rooms.name: Fire Arrow Chamber
rooms.solution: Clear the room's guardians and open the chest for the Fire Arrows, then thaw the nearby ice blocks.

rooms.name: Snowball Slope
rooms.solution: Fire-arrow or roll through the snowball-spawning slope to reach the stairs upward.

rooms.name: Wizzrobe Mini-Boss
rooms.solution: Hit the teleporting Wizzrobe with an arrow each time it reappears until it falls.

rooms.name: Giant Pillar Mechanism
rooms.solution: Light the frozen torches with Fire Arrows and hit the switch to raise the central column, linking the top floors.

markers.label: Raise the giant column (Fire Arrow torches)

sections.title: Great Bay — the Coast
sections.subtitle: Zora Mask → gather the eggs → Ice Arrows → Gyorg

video.creator: LongplayArchive
video.title: The Legend of Zelda: Majora's Mask — Full Longplay (N64)

steps.text: At Great Bay Coast, play the Song of Healing for the dying Zora guitarist Mikau to gain the Zora Mask.
As Zora Link, recover the stolen Zora eggs from the Pirates' Fortress (grab the Hookshot there) and the sea. Bring them to the Marine Research Lab; the hatchlings teach you the New Wave Bossa Nova.
Play it on the coast to summon the giant turtle, who ferries you to Great Bay Temple.
Inside, turn the spigot valves to reroute the water, win the Ice Arrows, and freeze currents into platforms to turn the great waterwheel. See the room solutions below.
Defeat Gyorg to free the third Giant and clear the poisoned bay.
Three Giants freed. The last lies east, in the cursed kingdom of Ikana.

objectives.label: Redirect the temple's water with the central spigot valves
Win the Ice Arrows to freeze water into platforms
Route the coloured pipes so the great waterwheel turns
Collect the Boss Key and reach the flooded arena
Defeat Gyorg to free the third Giant

rooms.name: Central Pipe Hub
rooms.solution: Stand on the middle platform and turn the spigot a quarter-turn to switch which coloured pipeline carries the water.

rooms.name: Wart Mini-Boss
rooms.solution: As Zora Link, destroy the floating eyeballs orbiting Wart, then attack the exposed core to win the Ice Arrows.

rooms.name: Red Pipe Room
rooms.solution: Freeze an Octorok's water spout into an ice block, climb to the spigot, and turn it so water runs the red line to the wheel.

rooms.name: Green Valve Room
rooms.solution: Fire Ice Arrows at the water jets to make platforms, then throw the green switch to send flow down the green pipes.

rooms.name: Waterwheel Shaft
rooms.solution: With the wheel turning, ride the moving platforms and currents up the vertical shaft to the higher doors.

rooms.name: Boss Key Chamber
rooms.solution: Freeze the flowing water into a path of ice blocks to cross to the chest holding the Boss Key.

markers.label: Central spigot — quarter-turn to reroute water
Red & green valve rooms (Ice Arrow platforms)

sections.title: Stone Tower — Ikana Canyon
sections.subtitle: Light Arrows → Elegy of Emptiness → flip the temple → Twinmold

video.creator: LongplayArchive
video.title: The Legend of Zelda: Majora's Mask — Full Longplay (N64)

steps.text: Enter the dead kingdom of Ikana. Restore the river with the Song of Storms, cure the Music Box House father (Gibdo Mask), and command the dead with the Captain's Hat and Garo's Mask.
In the Ancient Castle of Ikana, defeat the King to learn the Elegy of Emptiness — it leaves a statue of your current form to hold down switches.
Reach the Great Fairy nearby and reunite her stray fairies for the Great Fairy's Sword, then climb to Stone Tower Temple.

Inside, drop Deku/Goron/Zora/Link statues on switch puzzles, win the Light Arrows, and shoot the red sun-block to flip the entire temple upside-down. Win the Giant's Mask in the boss arena. See the room solutions below.
Defeat Twinmold with the Giant's Mask to free the fourth and final Giant.
All four Giants are freed. Return to Clock Town for the Final Day and the Carnival of Time.

objectives.label: Use the Elegy of Emptiness to leave statues on weighted switches
Flip the temple upside-down with a Light Arrow on the sun-block
Defeat Gomess for the Boss Key
Win the Giant's Mask from an Eyegore
Defeat Twinmold to free the final Giant

rooms.name: Multi-Switch Halls
rooms.solution: Play the Elegy of Emptiness to drop Deku, Goron, Zora and Link statues onto separate floor switches at once, opening the barred doors.

rooms.name: Sun-Block Entrance
rooms.solution: Shoot the glowing red sun emblem above the doorway with a Light Arrow to invert the whole temple — ceilings become floors.

rooms.name: Inverted Spike Rooms
rooms.solution: Navigate the flipped geometry, using Light Arrows on covered sun-switches to clear darkness and toggle sections.

rooms.name: Gomess Chamber
rooms.solution: Light the room and scatter Gomess's bat swarm; only Light Arrows pierce his cloak to stun him, then finish with the sword.

rooms.name: Eyegore Room
rooms.solution: Shoot the Eyegore's eye to freeze it, then attack the body. Defeating it yields the Giant's Mask.

rooms.name: Final Ascent
rooms.solution: Combine inversion flips and Elegy statues to reach the boss door, then enter the desert arena.

markers.label: Red sun-block — Light Arrow to flip the temple
Gomess (Light Arrows pierce his cloak) → Boss Key

sections.title: The Moon & Majora
sections.subtitle: Oath to Order → optional Fierce Deity's Mask → the three faces of Majora

video.creator: LongplayArchive
video.title: The Legend of Zelda: Majora's Mask — Full Longplay (N64)

steps.text: On the Final Night, climb the Clock Tower and play the Oath to Order. The four Giants answer and catch the falling moon — and Majora's Mask abandons the Skull Kid, pulling Link inside the moon.

On the moon's quiet grassy field, four masked children offer hide-and-seek trials. Optional but worth it: trade all 20 ordinary masks across the four children to earn the Fierce Deity's Mask from the lonely child by the tree.
Enter the final battle. Majora's Mask hovers and lashes tentacles — shoot or beam it.
Majora's Incarnation sprouts legs and sprints — chase it down with arrows or sword beams.
Majora's Wrath flails whip-like arms — stun it and pound it. With the Fierce Deity's Mask each form falls in seconds.
Majora is undone. The Giants set the moon back, the Skull Kid is freed, and dawn finally breaks over a saved Termina. The Happy Mask Salesman departs with his mask — and Link rides on.

objectives.label: Free all four Giants and play the Oath to Order atop the Clock Tower
Optional: trade all 20 ordinary masks to the Moon Children for the Fierce Deity's Mask
Defeat Majora's Mask
Defeat Majora's Incarnation
Defeat Majora's Wrath

rooms.name: Atop the Clock Tower
rooms.solution: On the Final Night, play the Oath to Order to summon the four Giants, who catch the moon and force the mask to abandon the Skull Kid.

rooms.name: The Moon's Field
rooms.solution: Speak to the four masked children to play their hide-and-seek mini-dungeons; trade all 20 ordinary masks for the Fierce Deity's Mask before facing the lone child.

sections.readinessNote: Free all four Giants first. The Fierce Deity's Mask is optional — but trading your 20 ordinary masks to the Moon Children makes the final fight trivial, so collect the masks before the last cycle.

locations.name: Clock Town
locations.reachableBy: The hub of Termina — central to every region; warp here with the Song of Soaring.
locations.whereWithin: South (Clock Tower), West (shops & bank), North (Great Fairy, playground), East (Stock Pot Inn, Milk Bar, Mayor)

contains.label: Clock Tower — opens midnight, Final Day

locations.name: Southern Swamp & Woodfall
locations.reachableBy: South from Clock Town through the swamp.

contains.label: Swamp Spider House — Mask of Truth

locations.name: Mountain Village & Snowhead
locations.reachableBy: North from Clock Town into the frozen mountains.

locations.name: Great Bay Coast
locations.reachableBy: West from Clock Town to the sea.

locations.name: Ikana Canyon & Stone Tower
locations.reachableBy: East from Clock Town to the dead kingdom.

locations.name: The Moon
locations.reachableBy: Play the Oath to Order on the Final Night.
